ddls:
CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the program is held */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the program */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age range for the program */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Detailed list of activities included in the program */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the program is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the program was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the program */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the program was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the location */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the location */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the location */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants the location can accommodate */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available at the location */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the location was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the location */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program the session belongs to */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor assigned to the session */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed per session */,
  "current_enrollment" INTEGER /* Current number of registered participants */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the session is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the session was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the session */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the session was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session the registration is for */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of payment (e.g., Paid, Pending) */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent who registered the participant */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* List of medical conditions of the participant */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* List of allergies of the participant */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the registration is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the registration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the registration was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the registration */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the registration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the registration this payment is associated with */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, Cash) */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent who made the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction identifier */,
  "is_refunded" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment has been refunded */,
  "refund_date" TEXT /* Date of the refund, if applicable */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the payment entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment was made */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the payment entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_registration_id FOREIGN KEY ("registration_id") REFERENCES registrations ("registration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waitlists" (
  "waitlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waitlist entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session the waitlist is for */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant on the waitlist */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "waitlist_date" TEXT /* Date the participant was added to the waitlist */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent who added the participant to the waitlist */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the waitlist entry is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the waitlist entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the waitlist entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the waitlist entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the waitlist entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waitlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlists_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlists_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., parent, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the user account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the user account */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session for which feedback is provided */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5 scale) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback entry is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the feedback entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was submitted */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the feedback entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
